key_finding: K-V FUNCTIONAL DISSOCIATION: V-magnitude at late 5% has ZERO effect (24/24 correct). K-perturbation (any geometric component) devastating (75-83% acc drop). No direction-magnitude double dissociation — magnitude is MORE destructive than direction at matched energy (0% vs 29.2%). Answer computation depends on precise attention ROUTING (K vectors) not value THROUGHPUT (V magnitudes).
evidence_impact: Identifies the MECHANISM of functional separability at late positions: K vectors (routing) carry critical answer info, V-magnitude is completely redundant. Closes the geometric separability hypothesis from 2602.11169 — the KV cache dissociation is K-vs-V, not direction-vs-magnitude. Opens new research direction: K-only PGD, K-V interaction effects, cross-model K-V replication.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Cross-model replication of K-V dissociation on Llama-3.1-8B. (2) K-only vs V-only PGD to test if adversarial null space lives in K-space. (3) V-magnitude robustness at higher noise fractions (10%, 20%). (4) K-only magnitude dose-response to isolate cliff location.

null_space_existence.status: strong (PGD-validated on Qwen). Likely operates through K vectors

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED: gold-standard double dissociation shows ZERO selectivity effect

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG: late positions selectively carry answer info (59x ratio). Mechanism now identified as K-routing

geometric_dissociation.status: Dir-vs-mag: DISCONFIRMED. K-vs-V: ESTABLISHED (strong). V-mag at late=zero effect, K=devastating

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. R-KV shows removing redundant tokens IMPROVES reasoning

cross_model_replication.status: K-V dissociation untested on other models. Position dominance replicated on all models

encoding_strategy.status: Digital (Qwen) vs distributed (Llama). K-V dissociation adds new dimension. Magnitude cliff at sigma 0.5-1.0

literature_convergence.status: 5+ independent groups converge on 'text is lossy projection'. K-V dissociation is novel contribution
